title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/09/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and keep upward all the day.The main contract closed at 691.5,increased of 1.77%. Steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and market turnover continues to pick up.PBF at Shandong port dealt 730-743 yuan/ mt,keep stable compare with yesterday. PBF at Tangshan dealt 749-753 yuan/mt,increase 3 yuan/mt than yesterday.
